postReview.title: Super subs send San Diego four points clear at Western summit
postReview.description: Hirving Lozano and Tomas Angel climbed off the bench to turn San Diego's 2-1 deficit into a dramatic 3-2 victory over FC Dallas on Saturday.

preReview.title: FC Dallas v San Diego FC: Iloski is a 'special player', says Vargas
preReview.description: San Diego will look to continue their stay at the top of the Western Conference when they face FC Dalles this weekend in MLS.

QAData.question: Who won between FC Dallas and San Diego FC on Sun, 29 Jun 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: San Diego FC won 3–2 over FC Dallas on Sun, 29 Jun 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
